title: senna trachypus
intro: Senna trachypus, also known as the climbing cassia, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used as a laxative due to its high sennoside content, which stimulates the bowels and promotes bowel movements. The medicinal properties of Senna trachypus include its ability to treat constipation, digestive issues, and even certain skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Senna trachypus often come in the form of tea or capsules, and it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it, as excessive consumption can lead to dependence and other health complications.
